title: Muscle Tissue RNA Extraction
author: Joesph B Lesnak
materials: Try to avoid really blood sections

steps.title: Remove tissue, cut off a section,...
steps.instruction: Remove tissue, cut off a section, and place in a 1.5 ml tube on dry ice. Measure the weight of each tissue and write down

steps.title: Can be stored in tubes long...
steps.instruction: Can be stored in tubes long term till ready to extract

steps.title: Prepare Lysis buffer
steps.instruction: Prepare Lysis buffer

steps.title: Add 10 ul of β-mercaptoethanol (BME)...
steps.instruction: Add 10 ul of β-mercaptoethanol (BME) per 1 mL of Buffer RLT

steps.title: Turn on heat block to 55°C
steps.instruction: Turn on heat block to 55°C

steps.title: Place tissue pieces in Corvaris TT1...
steps.instruction: Place tissue pieces in Corvaris TT1 bag and leave on dry ice till ready to pulverize

steps.title: Dip bag into liquid nitrogen and...
steps.instruction: Dip bag into liquid nitrogen and impact with Corvaris till powder is formed

steps.title: Add 300 uL of Buffer RLT...
steps.instruction: Add 300 uL of Buffer RLT + BME lysis buffer to bag to retrieve frozen, pulverized samples, and place back in 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: Mix up and down with pipette...
steps.instruction: Mix up and down with pipette tip to get all powdered sample around bag

steps.title: Add 590 uL of DNA/RNAse free water to each sample
steps.instruction: Add 590 uL of DNA/RNAse free water to each sample

steps.title: Add 10 uL of proteinase K to each sample
steps.instruction: Add 10 uL of proteinase K to each sample

steps.title: Mix with hand by turning over...
steps.instruction: Mix with hand by turning over and place in heat block at 55°C for 15 minutes

steps.title: Centrifuge sample for 10,000g at room temp for 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge sample for 10,000g at room temp for 3 minutes

steps.title: Transfer supernatant to new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer supernatant to new tube

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.5 volume of 100% ETOH (~450 ul) to each sample and mix by hand, do not vortex

steps.title: Load 700 uL of sample onto RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Load 700 uL of sample onto RNeasy spin column

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 seconds >8,000g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 seconds >8,000g at room temperature.

steps.title: Repeat loading until the whole sample...
steps.instruction: Repeat loading until the whole sample has gone through the column.

steps.title: Add 350 uL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Add 350 uL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 seconds >8,000g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 seconds >8,000g at room temperature.

steps.title: Perform DNAase clean up step
steps.instruction: Perform DNAase clean up step

steps.title: Add 70 uL of Buffer RDD...
steps.instruction: Add 70 uL of Buffer RDD (fridge) to aliquots of Qiagen DNAse (10 uL) (-20°C)

steps.title: Add the total volume from tube...
steps.instruction: Add the total volume from tube (~80 uL) directly on to column

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes

steps.title: Add 350 uL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Add 350 uL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 seconds >8,000g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 seconds >8,000g at room temperature.

steps.title: Add 500 uL Buffer RPE onto RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Add 500 uL Buffer RPE onto RNeasy spin column

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 seconds >8,000g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 seconds >8,000g at room temperature.

steps.title: Pipette 500 uL Buffer RPE onto the RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Pipette 500 uL Buffer RPE onto the RNeasy spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge 2 minutes > 8,000g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 2 minutes > 8,000g at room temperature.

steps.title: Transfer RNeasy spin column to new 2 mL collection tube
steps.instruction: Transfer RNeasy spin column to new 2 mL collection tube

steps.title: Centrifuge RNeasy spin column for 1...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge RNeasy spin column for 1 minute to dry at full speed (16,000g) at room temperature.

steps.title: Transfer the RNeasy column to new 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the RNeasy column to new 1.5 mL collection tube

steps.title: Pipette 40 uL of RNase-free water; incubate 1 min
steps.instruction: Pipette 40 uL of RNase-free water; incubate 1 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge RNeasy column for 15 seconds...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge RNeasy column for 15 seconds > 8,000g at room temperature

steps.title: Measure concentration and A260/A280 and A260/A230 ratios on nanodrop
steps.instruction: Measure concentration and A260/A280 and A260/A230 ratios on nanodrop

steps.title: Store RNA in -80°C
steps.instruction: Store RNA in -80°C
